notes: Score improved from 3.4 to 3.6 since last review — rate limit fix landed (nice, Maya). Core visual design and fun factor remain strong. Accessibility is still the biggest gap.
fixed_since_last_review: GitHub API rate limiting — switched to raw.githubusercontent.com ✅

suggestions.title: No ARIA labels or keyboard navigation on interactive elements
suggestions.description: Tab toggle buttons lack aria-selected/role='tab'. Worker cards and activity log have no semantic structure. Screen readers would struggle. Add role='tablist'/'tab'/'tabpanel', aria-labels on stat cards, and semantic headings.

suggestions.title: Office view characters overlap on narrow screens
suggestions.description: Desk positions use fixed percentages. On screens < 600px the office floor becomes too small and characters stack on top of each other, names become unreadable. Need responsive scaling or a minimum floor width with horizontal scroll.

suggestions.title: No task info visible in Office tab — hover tooltips needed
suggestions.description: Office view shows characters at desks but no indication of what they're working on. Users must switch to Dashboard for details. Add hover tooltip on working characters showing task + progress bar.

suggestions.title: Light mode office floor looks washed out
suggestions.description: Floor color (#e6e6f0) makes desk monitors (#b4b4cc) nearly invisible. Low contrast between floor, desks, and monitors in light theme. Darken desk surfaces or add stronger borders.

suggestions.title: Activity log entries use array index as React key
suggestions.description: ActivityLog uses key={i} which causes unnecessary re-renders when entries are prepended. Use a unique ID per entry (timestamp+type+worker or UUID).

suggestions.title: No loading state on initial fetch
suggestions.description: First load shows empty state ('Everyone's off the clock') before data arrives. Add skeleton loader or spinner for initial load to avoid flash of incorrect content.

suggestions.title: Stats bar should show roster size, not just active count
suggestions.description: 'On the Clock' stat only counts active workers. More informative to show '2/5 On the Clock' to convey team utilization at a glance.

suggestions.title: Browser notifications for worker status changes
suggestions.description: When a worker clocks in/out or finishes a task, a subtle browser notification or sound would make the live monitor feel alive. Should be opt-in with a toggle.

suggestions.title: Interactive coffee corner
suggestions.description: Coffee corner is decorative only. Could show a coffee counter, or have idle workers occasionally wander to it. Small delight, low priority.
